tasks.label: Build Manuscript (PDF)
tasks.command: mkdir -p build && for f in $(ls manuscript/chapters/*.md 2>/dev/null | sort); do cat "$f"; echo; done | pandoc - --metadata-file=manuscript/metadata.yaml -o build/chronikon.pdf

tasks.label: Build Manuscript (epub)
tasks.command: mkdir -p build && for f in $(ls manuscript/chapters/*.md 2>/dev/null | sort); do cat "$f"; echo; done | pandoc - --metadata-file=manuscript/metadata.yaml -o build/chronikon.epub

tasks.label: Preview Manuscript (HTML)
tasks.command: mkdir -p build && for f in $(ls manuscript/chapters/*.md 2>/dev/null | sort); do cat "$f"; echo; done | pandoc - --metadata-file=manuscript/metadata.yaml --standalone --css=build/chronikon.css -o build/chronikon.html && start build/chronikon.html
